meaning: n.抽象拚贴画(用报纸、布、压平的花等碎片拼合而成的)
examples: The illustrations make use of collage, watercolour, and other media.
My workspace — also my bedroom — used to contain one wall covered in a collage of photos.
The collage was reportedly created by actual Asus designers--CEO Jonney Shih, who said the company encourages its designers to foster any kind of crazy ideas.
Collage acts like a turbocharger to let a gaggle of cheap servers outgun far bigger machines.
The complexity of Villa Mairea makes it seem more like a collage than a unified building.
